# 🧠 HYPERION
## The Reasoning Amplification Engine for LLMs

### Tagline options:

**Option 1 (Default)**: Transform any LLM into a 100x deeper thinker through 9-stage recursive reasoning.

**Option 2**: Stop asking your LLM questions. Start having conversations with a deep thinker.

**Option 3**: It's not a smarter LLM. It's a smarter way to use any LLM.

**Option 4 (Viral)**: What if ChatGPT had 3 minutes to think before answering?

---

### 🎬 Tweet-ready descriptions:

**Short (280 chars):**
> Built Hyperion 🧠 — an open-source engine that makes any LLM think 9 different ways before answering. 100x deeper reasoning, multi-model routing, async, cache, memory, tools. MIT licensed. ⭐ github.com/ParsaSmahmoudi/hyperion

**Long (LinkedIn-style):**
> I'm excited to release Hyperion — a 9-stage reasoning amplification engine for LLMs.
>
> Instead of asking an LLM once, Hyperion:
> 1. Searches its own knowledge deeply
> 2. Expands context
> 3. Decomposes into sub-problems
> 4. Solves them in parallel
> 5. Reasons recursively
> 6. Self-critiques
> 7. Synthesizes
> 8. Verifies
> 9. Meta-reflects
>
> The result: answers that are 5-30x deeper than a single LLM call.
>
> Open source (MIT) · Python · Async · Caching · Memory · Tools · Multi-model
>
> ⭐ https://github.com/ParsaSmahmoudi/hyperion

**ProductHunt-style:**
> Hyperion makes any LLM think 9 different ways before answering. It's a reasoning amplification layer that turns single-shot LLM calls into deep, multi-path, self-critical thinking. Open source, MIT licensed, works with OpenAI, OpenRouter, and local Ollama. ⭐ github.com/ParsaSmahmoudi/hyperion

**Hacker News style:**
> Hyperion: 9-stage reasoning engine for LLMs. Decomposition + parallel solving + recursive depth + self-critique + synthesis + verification + meta-reflection + memory + tools. 5-30x deeper answers. Async, cached, multi-model. Open source MIT. (github.com/ParsaSmahmoudi/hyperion)
